title: Robin Jordan
compiled_truth: Robin Jordan is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-02-09 to 2001-06-04), Robin Jordan sent 4 and received 63 emails, totalling 67 interactions. Top correspondents: [Gareth Bahlmann](people/gareth-bahlmann) (3), [Kristina Mordaunt](people/kristina-mordaunt) (3), [Mark Haedicke](people/mark-haedicke) (3), [Alan Aronowitz](people/alan-aronowitz) (3), [Peggy Banczak](people/peggy-banczak) (3).
